The patient will survive for Iength of time equal to his WIL 5 minutes so long as he receives constant life support; This time doubled to WIL 10 minutes if the treating character is using an advanced medical Any minutes character had remaining to receive First Aid before death are added to this period At the end of this time, the character nas not yet reached medical facility staffed by characters with MedTech and Surgery Skills, he dies before death added to this period At the end of this time, the character has not yet received treatment Irom character with the Surgery Skill, he dies. [PDF_PAGE 145 | score=12] EQUIPMENT changed centuries Rules for the treatment of injuries can be found in Healing; p. 123_ either draw powe by plugging into cockpit powcr jack use its internal battery; which works for Up to 48 hours_ The pack can dispense up to dozen doses of medications before needing replenishment, though these medications must replaced at least once month whether used Or not,. medipack will deliver dose of medication each time its wearer takes wound Or gets stunned. The dose will prevent the character from being stunned ad will allow him to ignore all TN modifiers caused by Minor Wounds or less (Serious Wounds worse have their usual effects) The wound value of all wounds still counts as usual. Finally: any Knockout Checks are made with Modifier to the TN, So long as the doses have not all been used UP, BASIC EQUIPMENT The most basic of medical equipment enough treat common injuries the case of serious and life-threatening injuries; at best these kits can be stopgap measure that can Keep person alive Iong enough for someone with advanced medical training and equipment take Over_ Medlcal Kit The personal medical kit contains enough bandages and other supplies t0 tend all minor wounds, can also be used to Keep critically wounded character alive long enough tor medic or doctor t0 tend to the wounds: character performing First Aid needs such kit to avoid Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier Clan LSSU The Clans developed more sophisticated version Of the medipack, designated the Life Support Sustaining Unit (LSSU): Initially the L SSUs were only available t0 elementals; but Clan MechWarriors and pilots are now using this device. The Clan LSSU functions like the medipack (above), except contains twice as many doses of medication; Advanced Medical Kit This includes more extensive array
